title: Configurable Drops
description: Mob drops based off mob's power.
body:
Are you tired of only getting rotten flesh as a reward for killing a fully armored zombie? Why not change that!

This mod allows additional loot drops based off how strong the mob was. 

### In other words
The stronger the mob = more drops, the weaker the mob = less drops. 

# Compatibility
- Practically compatible with any mod. [this mod only adds on existing minecraft code]

# Note
- This mod currently only works on monsters. 
- This mod by itself does not add any additional loot drops, so you do need to add the additional loot manually. [[Here is a link to the wiki for that]](https://github.com/JeffIsntHere/Configurable-Drops/wiki)
- This mod was split from [Undead Armies](https://modrinth.com/mod/undead-armies)
